subsection.heading: Financial assistance for employee wages, salaries, and benefits
subsection.chapeau: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, to preserve aviation jobs and compensate air carrier industry workers, the Secretary shall provide financial assistance that shall exclusively be used for the continuation of payment of employee wages, salaries, and benefits to—

paragraph.content: passenger air carriers, in an aggregate amount up to $25,000,000,000;
cargo air carriers, in the aggregate amount up to $4,000,000,000; and
contractors, in an aggregate amount up to $3,000,000,000.

content.p: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary, may use $67,000,000 of the funds made available under section 9080(a) 11 So in original. There is no subsec. (a) in section 9080 of this title. of this title for costs and administrative expenses associated with providing financial assistance under this part.

note.heading: Effective Date of 2022 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 117–328 effective upon issuance of guidance or the promulgation of a rule by the Secretary of the Treasury, in consultation with the Secretary of Transportation, see section 102(c) of Pub. L. 117–328, set out as a note under secton 802 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare.
